final:
module top_module(
    input [3:0] out0,
    input [3:0] in1,
    output reg [1:0] result
);always @(*) begin
    if (out0 > in1) begin
        result = 2'b01; // out0 is greater than in1
    end else if (out0 < in1) begin
        result = 2'b10; // out0 is less than in1
    end else begin
        result = 2'b00; // out0 is equal to in1
    end
end

endmodule
